name: trading-news-terminal
description: AI-powered trading news terminal with real-time sentiment analysis, market data, and prediction markets
author: Bauhinia AI Limited

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "cd server && npx tsx watch src/index.ts" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
